steps.title: Translate the word problem into an algebraic expression
steps.content: We compute the total land used by horses: $2h$ acres, and by goats: $g$ acres. The total land used is $2h + g$ acres, which equals 21 acres: $$2h + g = 21$$.

steps.title: Identify the matching answer choice
steps.content: Looking at the answer choices, choice B states $$g + 2h = 21$$, which is exactly the same equation we derived. That matches choice B — B is correct.
